title: peramium yakushimense
intro: Peramium yakushimense, a type of plant known as a liverwort, is a species of non-vascular green plant that belongs to the moss family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine in Japan, where it is believed to have medicinal properties that help to reduce inflammation and promote the healing of wounds. The plant is rich in compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to improve overall health by reducing oxidative stress and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Peramium yakushimense can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support the immune system and promote liver health.
